title: oVirt / Red Hat Virtualization (RHV) Administrator Login and Privileged Action Audit Trail
exclusions: Standalone KVM/libvirt deployments without oVirt-Engine orchestration; Red Hat OpenShift Virtualization (OCP-Virt on KubeVirt ŌĆö different control plane); legacy oVirt 3.x / RHV 3.x (PostgreSQL 9 / WildFly 8 era ŌĆö different log format); deployments without /var/log/ovirt-engine/engine.log shipping configured; Hosted-Engine appliances where the engine VM has been migrated to a separate management cluster outside the audit perimeter.
dataSources: `index=virtualization` carrying **`sourcetype="ovirt:engine"`** (`**/var/log/ovirt-engine/engine.log`** WildFly **`ovirt-engine.service`** narrative lines with **`EVENT_ID:`** tuples), **`ovirt:httpd:access`** (**`/var/log/httpd/ovirt-engine/access.log`** distinguishing **`/ovirt-engine/webadmin/`** AdministrationPortal versus **`/ovirt-engine/userportal/`** VM Portal versus **`/ovirt-engine/api/`** REST **`GET`/`POST`** verbs), **`ovirt:server`** (**`/var/log/ovirt-engine/server.log`**), **`ovirt:notifier`** (**`/var/log/ovirt-engine/notifier/notifier.log`**), optional **`ovirt:audit_log`** rows replayed from PostgreSQL **`audit_log`** (**`audit_log_id`**, **`log_time`**, **`log_type_name`**, **`severity`**, **`user_name`**, **`correlation_id`**, **`cluster_name`**, **`data_center_name`**, **`vm_name`**, **`host_name`**, **`message`**) via **Splunk DB Connect** ([Splunkbase 2686](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/2686)) or **HEC** batches emitted by **`ovirt-engine-sdk-python`** polls of **`GET /ovirt-engine/api/events`**. Supplement **`linux_secure`** when **`Pluggable Authentication Module`** traces matter on the Engine OS.
app: **Splunk Universal Forwarder** with **`monitor://`** stanzas on the **oVirt-Engine / RHV-M** management host paired with **Splunk Add-on for Linux** ([**Splunk_TA_nix**, Splunkbase **833**](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/833)); optional **Splunk DB Connect** app ([Splunkbase **2686**](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/2686)) when **`audit_log`** SQL replicas beat REST pagination latency.
spl:
index=virtualization (sourcetype="ovirt:engine" OR sourcetype="ovirt:audit_log") earliest=-24h
| eval blob=coalesce(_raw, message, "")
| rex field=blob max_match=24 "(?i)EVENT_ID:\s*(?<evt>[A-Z0-9_]+)\((?<evt_num>\d+)\)"
| rex field=blob "(?i)Severity:\s*(?<engine_severity>INFO|WARNING|ERROR|ALERT)"
| rex field=blob "(?i)User\s+(?<principal>[\w\.@-]+)@(?<authz>[\w\.@-]+)(?:\s+cannot\s+login|\s+connected|\.)"
| rex field=blob "(?i)Correlation\s+ID:?\s*(?<correlation_id>[A-Fa-f0-9\-]{8,})"
| rex field=blob "(?i)(?<corr_bracket>\[[0-9a-fA-F\-]{8,}\])"
| eval correlation_id=coalesce(correlation_id, corr_bracket)
| eval principal_norm=lower(trim(coalesce(principal, user_name, 'unknown_principal')))
| eval portal_lane=case(match(blob,"(?i)/ovirt-engine/webadmin"), "AdministrationPortal", match(blob,"(?i)/ovirt-engine/userportal"), "UserPortal", match(blob,"(?i)/ovirt-engine/api"), "REST_API", match(blob,"(?i)/sso/oauth/token"), "OAuth_token_exchange", true(), "unspecified_engine_surface")
| eval aaa_lane=case(match(blob,"(?i)aaa-jdbc|aaa_jdbc|internal\\s+realm"), "aaa_jdbc_profile", match(blob,"(?i)aaa-ldap|aaa_ldap|active\\s+directory|freeipa"), "aaa_ldap_profile", match(blob,"(?i)aaa-misc|gssapi|certificate"), "aaa_misc_profile", true(), "aaa_unclassified")
| eval login_signal=case(evt="USER_VDC_LOGIN" AND evt_num="30", "login_success", evt="USER_VDC_LOGIN_FAILED" AND evt_num="114", "login_failure", evt="USER_VDC_LOGOUT" AND evt_num="31", "logout", true(), "other_login_family")
| eval privileged_motion=case(evt="USER_RUN_VM" AND evt_num="34", "vm_power_on", evt="USER_STOP_VM" AND evt_num="33", "vm_power_off", evt="VM_MIGRATION_DONE" AND evt_num="63", "vm_migration_complete", evt="VM_MIGRATION_FAILED" AND evt_num="65", "vm_migration_failed", evt="USER_ACTIVATED_HOST" AND evt_num="43", "host_activate", evt="USER_DEACTIVATED_HOST" AND evt_num="516", "host_deactivate", evt="USER_ADD_CLUSTER" AND evt_num="811", "cluster_create", evt="USER_REMOVE_CLUSTER" AND evt_num="813", "cluster_delete", evt="USER_ADD_PERMISSION" AND evt_num="852", "grant_acl", evt="USER_REMOVE_PERMISSION" AND evt_num="854", "revoke_acl", evt="USER_ADD_ROLE" AND evt_num="890", "role_grant", evt="USER_REMOVE_ROLE" AND evt_num="893", "role_remove", true(), "non_privileged_or_other")
| eval severity_bucket=case(evt_num="114" OR engine_severity="WARNING", "warn", engine_severity="ERROR" OR engine_severity="ALERT", "bad", evt_num="65", "bad", true(), "info")
| where login_signal!="other_login_family" OR privileged_motion!="non_privileged_or_other"
| eval cluster_name=coalesce(cluster_name,cluster), vm_name=coalesce(vm_name,vm), host_name=coalesce(host_name,host), data_center_name=coalesce(data_center_name,data_center)
| stats values(evt) as event_symbols, values(evt_num) as event_numbers, dc(authz) as auth_realms, values(portal_lane) as portals_hit, values(aaa_lane) as aaa_extensions_seen, latest(engine_severity) as latest_engine_severity, sum(eval(if(login_signal="login_failure",1,0))) as login_failed_lines, sum(eval(if(privileged_motion!="non_privileged_or_other",1,0))) as privileged_lines, latest(correlation_id) as sample_correlation, values(cluster_name) as clusters, values(vm_name) as guests, values(host_name) as hosts_seen, values(data_center_name) as datacenters by principal_norm
| eval combined_risk_score=(login_failed_lines*3)+privileged_lines
| sort - combined_risk_score
| head 200
cimSpl:
| tstats summaries=t count FROM datamodel=Authentication.Authentication WHERE nodename="Authentication" AND (Authentication.action=failure OR Authentication.action=success) BY Authentication.user Authentication.app earliest=-24h
| where count>=5
| eval note="Populate CIM Authentication fields from parsed engine tuples before relying on this shortcut alone."
description: Correlates **oVirt-Engine / RHV-M** **`engine.log`** **`EVENT_ID`** audit tuples (**`USER_VDC_LOGIN(30)`**, **`USER_VDC_LOGIN_FAILED(114)`**, **`USER_VDC_LOGOUT(31)`**) with privileged-motion traces (**`USER_RUN_VM(34)`**, **`VM_MIGRATION_DONE(63)`** / **`VM_MIGRATION_FAILED(65)`**, **`USER_ACTIVATED_HOST(43)`**, **`USER_DEACTIVATED_HOST(516)`**, **`USER_ADD_CLUSTER(811)`**, **`USER_REMOVE_CLUSTER(813)`**, **`USER_ADD_PERMISSION(852)`**, **`USER_REMOVE_PERMISSION(854)`**, role events) across **AdministrationPortal**, **UserPortal**, and **`/ovirt-engine/api/`** REST surfaces, layering **AAA extension** families (**`ovirt-engine-extension-aaa-jdbc`**, **`ovirt-engine-extension-aaa-ldap`**, **`ovirt-engine-extension-aaa-misc`**) so security and platform teams retain a defensible timeline when **KVM / VDSM** estates change state.
value: Administrator repudiation evaporates once Splunk stitches **WildFly**-emitted **`EVENT_ID`** narratives to **PostgreSQL** **`audit_log`** columnsŌĆöthe same tuples regulators expect during access attestationŌĆöwhile still explaining noisy but honest maintenance (storage sweeps, migration windows, directory lockout recovery) without forcing analysts to mine the Java UI alone before an insider or broken automation rewrites **cluster**, **storage-domain**, or **VM** posture.
implementation: Ship **`engine.log`** with a **LINE_BREAKER** tuned to Java multiline stacks, tag **`ovirt:engine`**, mirror **httpd** **`access.log`** for portal versus API path context, optionally land **`ovirt:audit_log`** from **DB Connect** or **`api/events`** pollers using **`correlation_id`** keys, then schedule daily attestation dashboards and high-water alerts on **`USER_VDC_LOGIN_FAILED(114)`** density per **`admin@internal`** successors.
detailedImplementation:
Prerequisites
ŌĆó **oVirt 4.5.x** upstream or **RHV 4.4** deployments where `ovirt-engine.service` writes **`/var/log/ovirt-engine/engine.log`** via **WildFly** while Apache httpd terminates `443` with `mod_proxy_ajp` to **`8080`**. Confirm **PostgreSQL** retains **`audit_log`** rows mirrored through **DB Connect** ([Splunkbase 2686](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/2686)).
ŌĆó Splunk Universal Forwarder plus Splunk Add-on for Linux ([Splunkbase 833](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/833)) must read Engine logs without weakening **`SELinux`**ŌĆörun **`restorecon -RFv /var/log/ovirt-engine`** after permission drift.
ŌĆó Map AAA extensions deliberately: `admin@internal` rides **`ovirt-engine-extension-aaa-jdbc`**, directories bind via **`ovirt-engine-extension-aaa-ldap`**, and **`ovirt-engine-extension-aaa-misc`** handles Kerberos or certificate quirksŌĆöwhitelist `authz` realms before blaming principals.
ŌĆó Separate portals functionally: `AdministrationPortal` (**`/ovirt-engine/webadmin/`**) exposes destructive infra verbs; `UserPortal` (**`/ovirt-engine/userportal/`**) stays VM-self-service; **`/ovirt-engine/api/`** plus `/ovirt-engine/sso/oauth/token` carry automation unique from federated Keystone stacks elsewhere.
ŌĆó Tie **`USER_ADD_PERMISSION(852)`** spikes to **`SuperUser`**, `ClusterAdmin`, **`DataCenterAdmin`**, `HostAdmin`, `NetworkAdmin`, `StorageAdmin` CMDB rolesŌĆönot opaque GUID blobs.

Step 1 ŌĆö Configure **`inputs.conf`** monitors and sourcetype hygiene
(1) Publish **`local/inputs.conf`** monitors mirroring `dataSources`ŌĆökeep **`engine.log`** as **`ovirt:engine`**, **`access.log`** as **`ovirt:httpd:access`**, notifier output as `ovirt:notifier`, `server.log` as **`ovirt:server`**.
```
[monitor:///var/log/ovirt-engine/engine.log]
index = virtualization
sourcetype = ovirt:engine

[monitor:///var/log/ovirt-engine/server.log]
index = virtualization
sourcetype = ovirt:server

[monitor:///var/log/ovirt-engine/notifier/notifier.log]
index = virtualization
sourcetype = ovirt:notifier

[monitor:///var/log/httpd/ovirt-engine/access.log]
index = virtualization
sourcetype = ovirt:httpd:access
```
(2) Tune **`LINE_BREAKER`** / **`TRUNCATE`** so `EVENT_ID:` tuples remain glued to **`java.lang`** tracesŌĆötruncating stacks fractures **`privileged_motion`** counts when `WildFly` emits verbose faults.
(3) Optionally ship **`linux_secure`** when `gssapi` pilots align with `aaa-misc` extension proofs.
(4) Decide whether **`ovirt-engine-sdk-python`** REST pollers execute from Heavy Forwarder credential vaults versus Search HeadsŌĆönever stash `engine-setup` secrets inside personal notebooks.
(5) Budget `indexes.conf` retentionŌĆöHosted-Engine maintenance duplicates `EVENT_ID` tuples until **`correlation_id`** dedupe macros reconcile upstream/downstream brokers.

Step 2 ŌĆö Optional `audit_log` ingestion (**DB Connect** or HEC)
(1) Grant read-only `SELECT` limited to `audit_log_id`, **`log_time`**, **`log_type_name`**, **`severity`**, **`user_name`**, **`correlation_id`**, **`cluster_name`**, **`data_center_name`**, `vm_name`, **`host_name`**, **`message`**ŌĆöreject **`SELECT *` during forensic `VACUUM`** cycles.
(2) Align **`rising`** inputs so JDBC timestamps stamp **`_time`** faithfullyŌĆölatency dashboards explain mismatched **`USER_RUN_VM(34)`** narratives versus **`audit_log` replicas lagging eleven minutes behind `WildFly`** buffers.
(3) Keep **`GET /ovirt-engine/api/events?search=`** parity whenever JDBC blocked ([REST guide](https://www.ovirt.org/documentation/doc-REST_API_Guide/)).
(4) Preserve **`correlation_id` JSON spelling inside HEC batchesŌĆöcamelCase drift breaks `transaction`** joins ([AAA overview](https://www.ovirt.org/develop/release-management/features/infra/aaa.html)).
(5) **`engine-setup`** OAuth rotations differ from **`ovirt-aaa-jdbc-tool`** JDBC resetsŌĆöroute LDAP outages through IAM bridges distinct from **`internal`** vault edits.

Step 3 ŌĆö Splunk correlation (**`spl` reference)
Paste `spl`** into hourly governance searches plus fifteen-minute SOC sweeps; macro-wrap **`index` when `virtualization_lab`** clones duplicate staging telemetry.

Search rationale highlights:
ŌĆō **`EVENT_ID`** **`rex` tolerates `Message:`** reorder across locales because **`evt_num`** integers (**`USER_VDC_LOGIN(30)`, `USER_VDC_LOGIN_FAILED(114)`) remain authoritative.
ŌĆō `portal_lane` distinguishes `AdministrationPortal` bursts from `UserPortal` self-service churn unrelated to infra sabotage.
ŌĆō `aaa_lane` separates `jdbc`**, **`ldap`**, **`misc`** chatterŌĆöcritical when **`USER_VDC_LOGIN_FAILED(114)`** reflects directory outages rather than guessed **`admin@internal` passwords.
ŌĆō `privileged_motion`** merges **`VM_MIGRATION_DONE(63)`**, **`USER_DEACTIVATED_HOST(516)`**, **`USER_REMOVE_CLUSTER(813)`** without twelve unrelated alerts.
ŌĆō **`combined_risk_score`** triple-weights **`login_failed_lines` yet still catches obsessive `USER_ADD_PERMISSION(852)`** streaks.

Step 4 ŌĆö Validate (**Administration Portal UI**, **`psql`**, **`curl`**)
(1) Verify against the RHV Administration Portal UIŌĆöunder **Administration ŌåÆ Event Log, confirm `EVENT_ID`** + **`correlation_id`** pairs mirror Splunk rows before arguing parsers broke.
(2) **`curl --negotiate`** / **`--user`** probes against **`https://<engine>/ovirt-engine/api/events` anchor REST timelines beside `engine.log` buffers ([REST guide](https://www.ovirt.org/documentation/doc-REST_API_Guide/)).
(3) `psql`** checks **`severity`** integers (**`0` normal, `10` error, `20`** alert) versus textual **`Severity:` stringsŌĆödo not silently downgrade `USER_REMOVE_PERMISSION(854)` urgency.
(4) Compare `USER_DEACTIVATED_HOST(516)`** bursts against **`fence` calendarsŌĆöexclude rehearsed `DR` subnets flagged `environment=DRT`** inside lookups.
(5) Correlate **`/sso/oauth/token`** **`HTTP 200` bursts with benign `USER_RUN_VM`** spikes whenever Ansible rotates **`refresh_token` cadences faster than humans log in.

Extended instrumentation guidance (between Steps 4 and 5)
Optional HEC batches sourced from scripted `GET /ovirt-engine/api/permissions` pulls enrich `USER_ADD_PERMISSION(852)` investigations when `engine.log`** truncates narratives yet REST JSON preserves **`role`** identifiers. Pair **`ovirt:httpd:access`** **`uri_path` telemetry showing `/ovirt-engine/webadmin`** bursts against **`ovirt:notifier` spikesŌĆöbroken SMTP relays sometimes mimic privilege floods despite steady `EVENT_ID` velocity. Mirror `postgresql`** slow-query cautiouslyŌĆönever substitute DB noise wholesale for **`audit_log` truth.

Step 5 ŌĆö Troubleshooting

ŌĆó No data for rotated `engine.log`** inode swaps until UF reopens descriptorsŌĆöbounce inputs after **`logrotate` rehearsals.

ŌĆó `EVENT_ID`** extraction misses localized **`Message:`** bundlesŌĆöfallback **`rex`** on **`evt_num` integers until parsers stabilize.

ŌĆó `principal_norm='unknown_principal'`** everywhereŌĆötighten **`User` `rex` or ingest structured `user_name`** from **`ovirt:audit_log`.

ŌĆó `portal_lane`** unspecifiedŌĆöjoin **`ovirt:httpd:access`** **`clientip` tuples ┬▒30 seconds around `_time` before blaming `REST` automation alone.

ŌĆó Duplicate JDBC plus REST duplicates privilege totalsŌĆödedupe `audit_log_id`** macros prior **`stats`.

ŌĆó `USER_VDC_LOGIN_FAILED(114)` clusters during IPA lockouts mimic stuffing until `idm` clears `policy`** relaxationsŌĆöthreshold per **`authz`.

ŌĆó `VM_MIGRATION_FAILED(65)` floods usually trace `storage-domain`** timeouts inside **`vdsm`** logsŌĆönot APT indicators.

ŌĆó **`SELinux` `AVC`** denies **`splunkfwd`** **`read`**ŌĆörun **`audit2why`** before reinstalling UF.

ŌĆó **`DB Connect` backlog stretches `_time` skewŌĆöpause paging until latency dashboards recover SLA.

ŌĆó `OAuth`** churn after Ansible **`client_secret`** rotations resembles brute-force burstsŌĆösuppress documented automation CIDRs nightly.

ŌĆó **`USER_REMOVE_CLUSTER(813)` bursts during `terraform` teardown mimic sabotage until SCM hashes convergeŌĆöannotate `pipelines`** inside lookups.

ŌĆó **`notifier`** storms amplify **`INFO`** chatterŌĆövalidate **`ovirt-engine-notifier.service`** health before rewriting SPL thresholds.

Governance overlays
Quarterly reviews compare **`combined_risk_score` deltas against `QuotaConsumer`** dashboardsŌĆöquota exhaustion legitimately amplifies **`USER_RUN_VM(34)` without implying lateral movement. `ovirt-engine-websocket-proxy.service`** TLS offload occasionally absorbs brute-force **`401` retries before `engine.log`** logs **`USER_VDC_LOGIN_FAILED(114)`, warranting `access_log`** companions whenever SOC insists perimeter telemetry disagree with JVM narratives.

Retention posture
Coordinate **`engine-config`** **`AuditLog` pruning intervals with Splunk `indexes.conf` frozen bucketsŌĆöseven-year `audit_log`** governance collapses when PostgreSQL trims **`log_time`** sooner than Splunk expects.

Operator bridging
Maintain **`rhv_principal_owner`** lookups tying **`principal_norm`** strings to real pager rotationsŌĆöHosted-Engine VIP DNS relabel events rename hosts yet **`authz`** realms stay stable, preventing mistaken termination tickets.
visualization: (1) **Matrix**: **`aaa_lane`** ├Ś **`login_signal`** heatmapped by **`login_failed_lines`**. (2) **Timeline**: **`privileged_motion`** stacked bars colored by **`severity_bucket`**. (3) **Sankey-style chord table**: **`principal_norm`** ŌåÆ **`clusters`** ŌåÆ **`guests`** for insider-threat hunts. (4) **Single-value**: rolling twenty-four-hour ratio of **`login_failed_lines`** to successful **`login_signal`** rows (`login_success`/`logout`) split by **`authz`**. (5) **Drilldown table**: **`combined_risk_score`**, **`event_symbols`**, **`portals_hit`**, **`datacenters`**, **`hosts_seen`** feeding ticketing workflows.
knownFalsePositives: **Rolling datastore evacuation migrations** ŌĆö engineers intentionally **`USER_RUN_VM`** / **`VM_MIGRATION_DONE(63)`** hundreds of guests while hosts drain; Splunk totals look like hostile sprawl unless **`change_record_id`** lookups mark the window. **`engine-setup` post-patch replays** ŌĆö package updates rerun configuration wizards that emit fresh **`USER_ADD_CLUSTER(811)`**-like noise (or benign **Engine** restarts) though no new physical **DataCenter** appears; correlate with **`rpm`** **change tickets** before escalating. **Ansible Tower or AWX loops refreshing OAuth secrets** against **`/ovirt-engine/sso/oauth/token`** stack **`USER_VDC_LOGIN_FAILED(114)`** lines when **`refresh_token`** lifetimes skewŌĆötreat as automation, not brute force, once inventory shows the controller host. **FreeIPA / Active Directory lockout storms** ŌĆö **`ovirt-engine-extension-aaa-ldap`** continues logging failures while **`kinit`** recovery works on the vault side; IAM noise should clear after **`password_expire`** fixes but still looks like attacker spray in raw counts. **Nightly snapshot pruning** paired with **`USER_STOP_VM`** patterns can resemble abusive power-off attempts when jobs touch the same **`vm_name`** repeatedly; validate **backup** product schedules. **Hosted-Engine live migration of the Engine VM** duplicates familiar **`EVENT_ID`** strings on both source and destination brokersŌĆödeduplicate via **`correlation_id`** plus **VDSM** host context to avoid twin alerts. **Certificate-heavy aaa-misc pilots** temporarily raise **`login_failure`** counts while browsers learn new trust anchorsŌĆötrack **PKI** **maintenance** feeds before opening **SOC** incidents. **DR site failovers rehearsed quarterly** replay **`USER_ACTIVATED_HOST(43)`** / **`USER_DEACTIVATED_HOST(516)`** stacks identical to sabotage drillsŌĆötag rehearsal subnets inside **`environment=DRT`** lookups.
hardware: Commodity x86_64 servers ŌĆö Dell PowerEdge R650/R750, HPE ProLiant DL360/DL380, Lenovo SR630/SR650, Cisco UCS C220/C240, Supermicro 2029U/6029U ŌĆö running Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.x/9.x or CentOS Stream 8/9 or Rocky Linux 8/9 or Alma Linux 8/9 with KVM/QEMU hypervisor and VDSM daemon. oVirt-Engine typically runs on a single appliance VM (oVirt-Engine Hosted-Engine pattern) or on a dedicated bare-metal/VM management node.
grandmaExplanation: We keep a plain-language diary of who signed into the virtualization control desk and who pressed the buttons that move clusters, disks, or guestsŌĆöso audits stay calm when someone asks what happened overnight.

controlTest.positiveScenario: A compromised **`cluster-admin`** principal fires **`USER_VDC_LOGIN_FAILED(114)`** bursts followed by successful **`USER_VDC_LOGIN(30)`** from a new workstation subnet, then **`USER_ADD_PERMISSION(852)`** granting **`SuperUser`** to a dormant LDAP aliasŌĆöSplunk **`combined_risk_score`** climbs because **`login_failed_lines`** and **`privileged_motion`** spike together.
controlTest.negativeScenario: Monthly **`USER_RUN_VM(34)`** waves triggered only by **`cron`**-scheduled **`ansible`** **playbooks** inside approved **`automation`** subnets keep **`login_failed_lines`** at zero and carry **`correlation_id`** tags tied to **`CHG`** ticketsŌĆörisk stays flat.
